yesterdayAnalysis: Easy 1.7mi pool swim at 107 HR for 23 TSS — perfect active recovery session the day after Tuesday's breakthrough 10.2-mile long run (102 TSS). Low heart rate confirms this was appropriately easy, allowing adaptation from the run volume while maintaining swim consistency heading into the peak week target of 9000m total.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's long bike ride with discipline — this is your biggest TSS contributor of the week and critical for hitting the 500 target. Keep power in your race range (145-152w NP, 66-69% FTP) and treat this as race rehearsal for pacing control, especially given your Oceanside success with conservative bike effort.
weekProgress: Week 8 of 10: At 448 TSS with 90% complete and 1 day remaining. Excellent progress — the Tuesday 10.2-mile long run (102 TSS) and Wednesday brick were executed well, and today's long ride will push you over target. Swim volume is tracking toward the 9000m goal with 4.4 miles logged so far across 3 sessions.
keyInsight: Sleep quality rebounded strongly to 82/100 last night (8.1h, good deep/REM split) after Thursday's poor 57-score night — you're recovered and primed for today's peak volume long ride.
